name: Trae
description: AI-powered coding assistant and VS Code fork by ByteDance offering code completion, agentic SOLO mode, and multi-model selection for free.
referrals: yes - SOLO Beta Invite Code Referral Program (launched April 2026)

free_tier_limits.free_requests_per_month: limited by Basic Usage allocation (exact token count not published)
free_tier_limits.chat_messages: limited by Basic Usage allocation (usage-based, depends on model)
free_tier_limits.rate_limits: Standard queue priority (slower than paid); 2 concurrent cloud tasks; limited SOLO mode
free_tier_limits.notes: No credit card required. Free tier includes access to Claude Sonnet 4, GPT-4o, DeepSeek R1, Gemini 2.5 Pro, and more. Paid tiers: Lite $3/mo, Pro $10/mo, Pro+ $30/mo, Ultra $100/mo.

notes: Free tier gives access to Claude Sonnet 4, GPT-4o, DeepSeek R1, Gemini 2.5 Pro, and ByteDance's Doubao 1.5 Pro at no cost with no API key. Formerly rebranded from MarsCode. Available as standalone IDE (VS Code fork, macOS/Windows/Web/iOS/Android) and VS Code/JetBrains plugin. Privacy concerns: ByteDance telemetry with 5-year data retention. No offline mode. MCP protocol and custom agents supported.

name: Kilo Code
description: Open-source AI coding agent for VS Code, JetBrains, and CLI with 500+ model support, orchestrator mode, and BYOK. Fork of Roo Code.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits: No hard rate limits. Free tier routes through Auto Free using GLM 4.7 or MiniMax M2.1 via Kilo Gateway.
free_tier_limits.notes: Free tier provides two frontier models at no cost (GLM 4.7, MiniMax M2.1). No credit card required. BYOK to any provider and pay nothing to Kilo. New users get $20 free credits for paid model tiers.

notes: Fork of Cline and Roo Code. Apache-2.0 license. 500+ models across 60+ providers via OpenRouter + direct integrations. Zero markup on model costs. Orchestrator mode with Architect/Code/Debug agents. Teams $15/user/mo. 3M+ users. 1.19M VS Code installs. GitHub: 11.9k stars.

name: Gemini Code Assist
description: Official Google VS Code extension for AI-assisted development powered by Gemini models with 1M token context window.

free_tier_limits.free_requests_per_day: 1000 (combined agent mode + Gemini CLI requests per user per day)
free_tier_limits.rate_limits: Daily cap of 1000 requests resets each day. No credit card required.
free_tier_limits.notes: Free tier (individuals) requires Google account login, no API key needed. Uses Gemini 2.5 model. Agent mode and Gemini CLI share the same 1000/day quota.

status: active (free tier deprecated — migrating to Antigravity by June 18, 2026)
notes: CRITICAL: Google announced Gemini Code Assist free tier will stop serving requests starting June 18, 2026. Users must migrate to Antigravity. Paid Standard ($22.80/user/month) and Enterprise ($54/user/month) remain. Formerly called 'Duet AI for Developers'. Rating 2/5 based on 796 reviews (slow responses, bugs). Note: there is an unrelated third-party 'Gemini Assistant' by Bini on marketplace.

name: Amazon Q Developer
description: AWS's generative AI coding assistant with inline code suggestions, chat, agentic coding, security scanning, and Java/.NET code transformation.

free_tier_limits.free_requests_per_month: 50 agentic requests (chat + agentic coding) per month
free_tier_limits.autocomplete_suggestions: unlimited inline suggestions as you type
free_tier_limits.rate_limits: 50 agentic requests/month per user (Builder ID). Account-level quotas for IAM users.
free_tier_limits.notes: Free tier is perpetual (no time limit). Includes: unlimited code autocomplete (15+ languages), 50 agentic chat/coding requests/month, 1,000 LOC Java transformation/month, security scanning, reference tracking. AWS Builder ID (free) sufficient. No credit card required.

notes: Formerly AWS CodeWhisperer (rebranded April 2024). One of the most generous free tiers: unlimited autocomplete, 50 agentic requests/month, security scanning included. 1.74M+ VS Code installs. Pro tier $19/user/month adds higher limits (1,000 agentic requests/month), IP indemnity, SSO. Also on JetBrains, Visual Studio, Eclipse, AWS Console.

name: GitHub Copilot
description: AI pair programming tool by GitHub/Microsoft providing inline code completions, chat, and agent-mode across multiple IDEs.

free_tier_limits.free_requests_per_month: 2000 code completions and 50 chat requests (including Copilot Edits and agent mode)
free_tier_limits.chat_messages: 50 per month (includes all chat, agent mode, Copilot Edits)
free_tier_limits.rate_limits: 50 chat requests/month across all chat features. Completions reset monthly. No overage available on Free.
free_tier_limits.notes: Free tier launched Dec 2024. No credit card required. Agent mode available on Free (counts toward 50 chat/month). All 22 models accessible on Free from limited chat quota.

notes: Copilot Free: 2000 completions + 50 chat requests/month. All 22 models across all plans (Free/Pro/Pro+/Max) including Claude Opus, GPT-5 series, Gemini series. Pro $10/mo adds unlimited completions, cloud agent, code review. VS Code: 73.8M installs, 4.0/5 (1051 ratings). Moving to token-based billing (GitHub AI Credits) as of June 1, 2026.

name: Augment Code
description: AI-powered coding platform with proprietary context engine that indexes entire repos for agent, chat, and inline completions across VS Code, JetBrains, and CLI.

free_tier_limits.free_requests_per_day: unlimited for completions and Next Edit
free_tier_limits.free_requests_per_month: unlimited for completions and Next Edit
free_tier_limits.autocomplete_suggestions: unlimited inline completions with full codebase context (free forever)
free_tier_limits.chat_messages: credit-based: 30,000 credits on trial signup (with valid card). Chat/agent consume credits. No ongoing free credits after trial.
free_tier_limits.rate_limits: 30,000 credits one-time for trial; no recurring free credits. Completions and Next Edit remain free indefinitely.
free_tier_limits.notes: All 15 models accessible on free tier via trial credits. After trial credits exhausted, chat/agent stop until upgrade. Completions and Next Edit free forever without limits.

notes: Key differentiator: proprietary Context Engine that semantically indexes entire codebase (not just grep). Paid: Indie $20/mo (40K credits), Standard $60/mo (130K credits), Max $200/mo (450K credits). BYOK for Enterprise. SOC 2 Type II, ISO 42001. Auggie CLI, Cosmos multi-agent, MCP support. No referral program.

name: Codeium
description: AI coding assistant (rebranded to Windsurf, then acquired by Cognition AI as Devin Desktop) with unlimited autocomplete and Cascade agent for 70+ languages.
referrals: yes - 250 flex credits for both referrer and referee on Pro subscription.

free_tier_limits.free_requests_per_day: limited (light daily quota, exact number undisclosed)
free_tier_limits.autocomplete_suggestions: unlimited single and multi-line completions forever (Tab completions do not consume quota)
free_tier_limits.chat_messages: limited (part of light daily/weekly agent quota)
free_tier_limits.rate_limits: Daily and weekly quota refresh. Limited model availability on free (no premium Claude/GPT/Gemini). SWE-1.6 at slow speed.
free_tier_limits.notes: Free tier generous for light use (under ~10 hrs/week). Tab/completions genuinely unlimited forever. Cascade agent and Chat consume from daily quota. No payment info required.

notes: TIMELINE: Codeium (2022) -> Windsurf (late 2024) -> Acquired by Cognition AI/Devin (Dec 2025) -> Devin Desktop (2026). VS Code extension still published as 'Codeium' but displays as 'Windsurf Plugin (formerly Codeium)'. 3.8M+ installs, 5 stars (1460 ratings). Pro $20/mo, Max $200/mo, Teams $40/user/mo. SWE-1.6 proprietary model family. Cascade is their multi-file agentic system.

name: Opencode
description: Open source AI coding agent that runs in terminal, desktop, or IDE. Supports 75+ LLM providers via BYOK with free models included.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits: None on tool itself; depends on chosen provider's API limits.
free_tier_limits.notes: 100% free and open source (MIT). Free Zen models available for limited time. Must BYOK for paid providers. Zen pay-as-you-go ($20+) and Go subscription ($10/mo) are optional.

notes: 100% open source (MIT). TypeScript. 173k+ GitHub stars, 7.5M monthly devs, 900+ contributors. Available as terminal TUI, desktop app (beta), and VS Code/IDE extension. Features Plan mode (read-only) and Build mode (full access), LSP integration, MCP support, multi-session agents. Latest v1.17.3 (Jun 10 2026). Built by Anomaly.
